title: Prologue: The Old Attic
content: I found this journal in the attic today. It smells of dust and old memories. The pages are yellowed, begging to be written on. I suppose I should start from the beginning...

title: Chapter 1: The Stranger
content: A stranger arrived in town today. He wore a coat that seemed to absorb the light around him. Nobody knows where he came from, or why he's here.

title: Chapter 2: The Letter
content: A letter was slid under my door. No return address. Just a single symbol wax-sealed on the back. It looks like an eye, but different somehow.

title: Chapter 3: The Discovery
content: I followed the map from the letter. It led me to the edge of the woods. The trees whispered as I approached. I found it.
